text: AI is transforming the workplace in several important ways. Automation now handles repetitive tasks like data entry and scheduling, freeing employees for more creative work. Productivity tools using AI help workers analyse information faster and make better decisions. However, rather than replacing humans completely, the most effective approach is human-AI collaboration, where AI assists but people remain in control. This partnership means many jobs will change rather than disappear. Workers may need to learn new skills, such as managing AI systems and interpreting their outputs. Overall, AI offers opportunities to work smarter, but adapting to these changes requires ongoing learning and flexibility.
